title: Elevate online is coming soon!

posts.author: OmerK (Omer Koort)
posts.cookedHtml:
Four different tracks in one event? Say what???

If you’ve been wanting to experience the magic of Elevate, here’s your chance!

Join us on December 4th as the Monday Mansion hosts its annual online event. Following the success of Elevate in London, New York, and Sydney, we’re excited to bring you a day packed with activities. Discover how people use Monday, learn about new product announcements, and participate in one of the many workshops taking place.

We look forward to seeing you there! Register here
